setting: unresectable or metastatic synovial sarcoma after prior chemotherapy
evidence_notes: Accelerated approval based on ORR and duration of response; requires HLA-A*02:01P/*02:02P/*02:03P/*02:06P and MAGE-A4 expression.

endpoint_value: first-line standard with durable response or disease control
evidence_notes: First-line GIST standard; response and PFS vary by KIT/PDGFRA genotype.

setting: grade 2 IDH1/2-mutant astrocytoma or oligodendroglioma after surgery
evidence_notes: Use for IDH1/2-mutant grade 2 glioma; evidence is not a generic IDH expression benefit.

setting: newly diagnosed advanced ovarian cancer with BRCA mutation after platinum response
endpoint_value: SOLO1 sustained PFS benefit with 7-year OS follow-up
evidence_notes: Maintenance PARP inhibitor evidence applies to BRCA-mutated disease after platinum response.

setting: PSMA-positive metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer after ARPI and taxane
endpoint_value: VISION OS and radiographic PFS benefit
evidence_notes: Requires PSMA-positive imaging and prior treatment context.

setting: MSI-H or dMMR solid-tumor indication transferred to ovarian context only when biomarker is present
endpoint_value: indication transferred from MSI-H/dMMR solid-tumor evidence
evidence_notes: Do not treat as ovarian-specific benefit unless MSI-H/dMMR eligibility evidence is supplied.

endpoint_value: FAERS spontaneous reports are signal context only
evidence_notes: Spontaneous-report data are not incidence estimates and should not be used as grade 3+ AE rates.
